description: 1. Hydrophobic or water-repellent leather2. Waterproof and breathable membrane3. Supple or flexible, full-grain leather, EVA midsole for ease of use4. Stinger Q-lock spikes, hard thermoplastic arch support for stabilityThese waterproof and breathable pair of comfortable Golf shoes are suitably designed for golfers. They are comfortable, light-weight and stable all-season shoes.
